caption: The video features an older man with gray hair, wearing a black sweater over a light-colored shirt. He appears to be engaged in a conversation or delivering a speech, as he is seen speaking and gesturing with his hands. The background is simple, with a plain white wall and some books stacked on a surface to the right. The lighting is even, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly a home or office. The man's expression changes slightly between the frames, indicating that he is actively communicating. The logo "Tiger-TV" in the top right corner suggests that this might be part of a television broadcast or interview.
